protectedNote: Employer area. Access control and approval gating are added in Phases 2–3; this preview shows the calm workspace layout and its states.

dashboard.title: Recruitment workspace
dashboard.description: Your attention queue, active roles, and pipeline at a glance.

attention.title: Attention queue
attention.emptyBody: New applicants and items needing review will appear here.

activeJobs.title: Active jobs
activeJobs.emptyBody: Publish your first role to start receiving applications.

pipeline.title: Candidate pipeline
pipeline.emptyBody: Pipeline counts appear once candidates apply.

insights.title: Recruitment insights
insights.emptyBody: Reliable analytics appear once your roles gather views and applications.

pending.title: Your account is under review
pending.description: An MHA administrator is reviewing your organisation.
pending.nextStepBody: We'll email you once a decision is made. You can update allowed company details below in the meantime.
pending.editBody: Keep your organisation information accurate while your account is reviewed. Changes are saved immediately.

rejected.title: Registration not approved
rejected.body: Your registration was not approved. You can review the reason, update your details, and resubmit where allowed.
rejected.reasonFallback: MHA did not provide a specific reason. Contact us for details before resubmitting.
rejected.editBody: Correct the details below and save to resubmit your organisation for review.

suspended.title: Your account is suspended
suspended.body: Your employer account has been suspended. You can review your account information and contact MHA.
suspended.noticeBody: While suspended, you cannot publish or modify jobs, view new candidate information, or change applicant statuses. Contact MHA to discuss restoring your account.

companyProfile.title: Company profile
companyProfile.description: The details candidates see on your company page.
companyProfile.editLead: These details appear on your public company page. Keep them accurate and complete to attract the right candidates.
companyProfile.emptyBody: Add your description, location, and culture to attract the right candidates.

fields.companySummaryHint: A short overview candidates see on your company page.
fields.websiteHint: Include the full address, starting with https://.
fields.cultureHint: What it's like to work at your organisation.
fields.benefitsHint: Key benefits and perks you offer.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.description: Create, publish, and manage your vacancies.
jobs.emptyBody: Create your first role to start receiving applications.

newJob.title: Post a job
newJob.description: Provide complete, accurate details. You can save a draft and publish when ready.
newJob.shellNote: This form is a layout preview. Job creation is wired up in Phase 4.

jobDetail.title: Job
jobDetail.notFoundBody: This job could not be found, or it doesn't belong to your organisation.

jobEdit.title: Edit job
jobEdit.description: Update the details of this role.

applicants.title: Applicants
applicants.description: Review and progress candidates for this role.
applicants.emptyBody: Applicants appear here once candidates apply to this role.

split.selectPrompt: Select a candidate to review their profile, resume, and answers.

applicants.privacyNote: You only see candidates who applied to your roles.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Reliable recruitment metrics for your roles.
analytics.emptyBody: Analytics appear once your roles gather views and applications.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your workspace, language, and team access.
settings.emptyBody: Settings will be available once accounts are connected in Phase 2.
